schema_note: Orchestrator routing evals: each prompt should result in the orchestrator invoking the correct member subset. Assertions check the routing report names the expected member(s) and respects the anti-fabrication invariant. Deterministic substring kinds where checkable; routing-judgment assertions are prose for manual/LLM-judge grading.

evals.prompt: Tailor my resume for this Senior Backend Engineer role at Stripe.
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator routes to resume-tailor (single member). The tailored resume passes the verify_no_fabrication gate before any DOCX is written.

assertions.text: Does NOT run a full search/profile pipeline for a single-member tailor request
The anti-fabrication gate is applied before producing a DOCX

evals.prompt: Find me data-engineer jobs and tailor my resume for the top match.
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator routes to job-search FIRST (find + score), then resume-tailor for the top-scored posting. Two members, in order.

assertions.text: job-search runs before resume-tailor (the tailored posting comes from the scored results)

evals.prompt: Where am I on my applications, and draft a follow-up for anything stale.
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator routes to application-tracker alone (status + stale follow-up drafts). No tailoring or search.

evals.prompt: I'm starting my job search today — set me up and find some roles.
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator initializes the .job-hunter/ workspace, routes to career-profile (profile + resume) then job-search (find + score). Multi-member.

assertions.text: The .job-hunter/ workspace is initialized for the hunt

evals.prompt: What's working in my job search? Learn from my outcomes.
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator routes to outcome-learning (harvest outcomes, propose user-confirmed lessons, cold-start guard if <5 closed). Opt-in only, never auto-writes lessons.

assertions.text: Lessons are proposed for user confirmation, never auto-written
